title: Reflect Data and ARIA State without Making CSS the Controller
summary: Build and verify css data aria state in shift availability and disclosure state synchronization through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain css data aria state from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply css data aria state without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

options.text: Shift availability and disclosure state synchronization case 1: changing generated content or color updates an ARIA state automatically.

Shift availability and disclosure state synchronization case 1: update state in the owning behavior, synchronize ARIA and data attributes, then use selectors as presentation and verify every transition.
Shift availability and disclosure state synchronization case 1: set content "expanded" in ::after and assume aria-expanded becomes true.

steps.title: 02 · Read the shift availability and disclosure state synchronization case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 2: Which claim preserves css data aria state when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: shift availability and disclosure state synchronization.
steps.why: Reflect Data and ARIA State without Making CSS the Controller makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 2 in shift availability and disclosure state synchronization.

content.text: Data attributes can expose application-specific state and ARIA states communicate accessibility semantics. CSS may style [data-status="open"], [aria-current="true"], or [aria-expanded="true"], but generated content and colors do not update DOM state, keyboard behavior, focus, or business logic. State changes must happen in the owning HTML or script and styling must visibly reflect truth. Apply it to shift availability and disclosure state synchronization.

Shift availability and disclosure state synchronization case 2: set content "expanded" in ::after and assume aria-expanded becomes true.
